name: daily-digest
description: Generate a digest of recent project activity by reviewing episodic memory and workspace changes. Use when the user asks for a daily summary, status update, what happened recently, or wants a catch-up on project activity. Can also be scheduled to run automatically.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period: today, yesterday, this-week, or a specific date

schedulable.description: Generate a daily digest of project activity and optionally send via Telegram
